text: You find a ransacked convenience store. Most of it's been picked clean, but there's still something left on the shelves.
A pharmacy, doors hanging open. The prescription drugs are gone but the shelves still hold basics.
Compliance Drone patrol. They've swept this block twice already. You hear the rotors before you see them.
A locked utility cabinet behind a diner — someone stashed supplies and never came back for them.
It rains hard overnight. Your pack wasn't sealed. The food tastes wrong in the morning.
You find a sheltered alcove out of the wind. The city hums with distant machinery. You sit close together and don't say much.
